# Tool repo with stale aggregate counts

A Cursor IDE plugin providing widget workflows. 17 skills, 10 rules, and
150 MCP tools for widgets.

skills/ contains 17 skill directories.
rules/ contains 10 rule files.

In a code block, we still warn — even stale narrative in examples is
still stale:

```
skills/                      # 17 skill directories, each with SKILL.md
rules/                       # 10 rule files (.mdc)
```
